title: Build a Confidential Email Page
description: A mock confidential email page demonstrating the CSS box model. The main email container uses box-sizing: border-box so its 500px width includes padding and border. Two inline-block stamps are rotated with transform, and sensitive words are blurred using filter: blur(3px) on span elements.
objectives: Use box-sizing: border-box to include padding and border in the element's total width
Use display: inline-block for elements that need width, height, and rotation
Use transform: rotate() to tilt stamp elements
Use filter: blur() to obscure sensitive inline text
Set margin-left to position inline-block elements horizontally

files.name: index.html
files.content:
CONFIDENTIAL

Dear Agent S'more,

We have an emergency. The secret formula for our Mega Marshmallow has been compromised. This formula is what makes our marshmallows the fluffiest and most delicious.

We suspect that Professor Puff is behind this. He has taken the formula to his hidden laboratory. Your mission is to infiltrate the lab and secure the formula before it's too late.

Be sure to keep the lab's location confidential. Any leak of this information could jeopardize the entire operation.

TOP SECRET

files.name: styles.css
